/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/irq_aggregator_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_irq_aggregator.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_irq_aggregator  -ldl -lm
